title: chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. maximum
intro: Chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. maximum, also known as the Maxim's daisy or large white daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. maximum include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and promoting digestion. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
